name: track_lock
_note: track_lock mirrors a claimed heir-slot into the caller's in-memory estate bookkeeping (globalThis._concordSTATE.inheritanceEstates). priceCc is the escrow amount and is fail-CLOSED via badCc() BEFORE the lock is created — a poisoned value (NaN/Infinity/-1/1e308/>1e6) returns ok:false 'invalid numeric field: priceCc', so it can never inflate escrowedCc (the sum over live locked/amended locks) or refundedCc on revoke. status starts 'locked'. No real wallet CC moves here — this is estate-side bookkeeping; the actual escrow lives in the server.js inline inheritance.claim_slot DB path.
